task_objective: Fix the strict-review finding where warmed UI state could initialize from a stale selected_game after refresh defaulted to a fallback game.
design_decisions: Kept the fix local to the frontend warmed-cache path.
Synchronized local settings and globalSettings whenever refresh applies either a valid preferred/current selected game or a fallback first game.
Did not change backend RPC contracts or add dependencies.
results: The new regression test failed before the implementation and passed after the fix.
Frontend typechecking passed after the change.
